story.title: Claude Code uses Bun written in Rust now

draft:
I've been following Claude Code's shift to Bun, written in Rust, and it's got me thinking about the tradeoffs between performance and development speed. 
Bun's focus on speed and efficiency is notable, given its Rust foundation. 
I'm curious to see how this change impacts Claude Code's overall performance.
Will this trend towards Rust-based frameworks continue?
#Rust #Bun #SoftwareDevelopment 
#ClaudeCode
